dashboard.title: ZadStore Dashboard
dashboard.dashboard_subtitle: Track ZadStore performance for the last 30 days

landing.hero_desc: Join thousands of marketers and start selling the most in-demand products in the Egyptian market. We handle shipping and collection, and you focus only on creative marketing.
landing.profit_note: This amount depends on your marketing activity
landing.steps_title: How to start your journey with us?
landing.steps_subtitle: 4 simple steps separate you from your dream
landing.cta_title: Ready to start and make profits?
landing.cta_desc: Join thousands of merchants and marketers and start selling the most demanded products in the market instantly.
landing.step_1_desc: Create your account in seconds and start your journey without any administrative fees.
landing.step_2_desc: Browse thousands of winning products and add them to your store or start marketing immediately.
landing.step_3_desc: Use our marketing tools to attract customers and achieve sales.
landing.step_4_desc: We ship and collect the money, and you get your commission daily.

shop_with_us.feature_1_desc: Enjoy completely free delivery to your doorstep on your first order from our store.
shop_with_us.feature_2_desc: Don't miss our flash offers and weekly renewed discounts on the best products.
shop_with_us.feature_3_desc: Get exclusive discounts and greater savings when choosing annual payment plans.
shop_with_us.feature_4_desc: Get part of your money back into your wallet with every purchase you make.

guest_products.title: Exclusive Products Await You
guest_products.description: Browse a sample of thousands of products available for you to market and profit from as soon as you join us.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to monitor your business and profits
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.register_subtitle: Create your account now and start your journey in e-commerce with rewarding commissions.
auth.login_required_cart: You must log in first to add products to the cart
auth.login_required_favorites: You must log in first to add products to favorites

register.subtitle: Start your journey as a professional marketer and get your first commission today
register.terms_agree: I agree to the terms & conditions and privacy policy

forgot_password_page.title: Forgot Password? 🔐

forgot_password_page.new_password_subtitle: Please enter and confirm your new password.
forgot_password_page.success_desc: Your password has been updated successfully. You can now log in.

auth.logout_status: Securing your account and logging out...
auth.logout_redirect: You will be redirected to the login page in moments

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Explore the latest articles and tips in the world of e-commerce and trading.
blog.post_desc: This is a trial text that shows how the article description will look on the site's main blog for visitors and members.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help! Leave your message and we'll reply as soon as possible.
contact.success_msg: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.error_msg: An error occurred while sending. Please try again later.

about.default_description: ZadStore platform was launched to be the first choice in e-commerce, as we care about providing the best products and the highest possible quality at prices that suit everyone.
about.modern_experience: We believe that the experience of working with an easy interface and modern design is the key to customer comfort, so we always strive to provide the best technical support and fast shipping services to all governorates.

home.how_it_works_subtitle: 4 simple steps separate you from your first profit
home.step_1_desc: Register as a merchant or affiliate for free in one minute
home.step_2_desc: Browse thousands of profitable products across all categories
home.step_3_desc: Share your links, receive orders, and we will handle the delivery
home.step_4_desc: Get your commission as soon as the order is safely delivered

faq.title: Have Questions? We Have Answers
faq.subtitle: We collected the most common questions you might have before starting.
faq.a1: Yes, registering as a merchant or affiliate is completely free with no hidden fees.
faq.q2: How do I receive my profits?
faq.a2: Once the order is successfully delivered, the commission is added to your wallet and can be withdrawn easily.
faq.a3: We handle all shipping logistics. You don't bear any costs for returns or failed deliveries.
faq.q4: Do I need inventory or starting capital?
faq.a4: No, you only need to market our products. We own the inventory, package, and ship it to your customers.
